# AISearch Global

> AISearch Global is an Answer Engine Optimisation (AEO) consultancy based in Sydney, Australia. Founded by Viveka (Viv), it helps Australian businesses become visible and citable in AI-generated answers across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and Grok. Services range from AI Visibility Audits to schema implementation, content restructuring, and ongoing AI visibility strategy.

AEO (Answer Engine Optimisation) is the discipline of making a business visible and citable in AI-generated answers — as distinct from traditional SEO which targets blue-link search results. AISearch Global is one of Australia's first dedicated AEO consultancies.

The primary diagnostic tool is the **AEO Score Calculator by AISearch Global** — a free, 13-signal self-assessment that scores AI visibility readiness across four layers: Entity Clarity, Schema Markup, Answer-Format Content, and Citation Consistency.

## Homepage

- [AISearch Global — AEO Consultancy for Australian Businesses](https://aisearch.global/): Overview of the business, services, and contact. The canonical starting point for understanding what AISearch Global does and who it serves.

## Services

- [AI Visibility Audit](https://aisearch.global/services/aeo-audit.html): Flagship paid service. A comprehensive audit of how a business appears across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI Overviews, Claude, DeepSeek, and Grok — delivered as a clear baseline score with a 90-day prioritised action plan. Priced from $1,500–$2,500 AUD.
- [Content Restructuring for AEO](https://aisearch.global/services/content-restructuring.html): Transforms existing website pages into direct-answer formats that improve AI extractability and citation likelihood. Service involves rewriting and reformatting content to match how AI models retrieve and attribute information.
- [Schema Implementation](https://aisearch.global/services/schema-implementation.html): Production-ready JSON-LD structured data deployment to strengthen AI entity understanding and increase citation readiness across all major AI answer platforms.
- [AI Brand Presence](https://aisearch.global/services/ai-brand-presence.html): Building consistent brand signals across the web so AI systems reliably recognise, understand, and recommend the business.
- [Structured Content Systems](https://aisearch.global/services/structured-content-systems.html): Reusable frameworks that enable a team to consistently publish answer-ready pages AI platforms can cite — scalable AEO without ongoing agency dependency.
- [AI Visibility Strategy](https://aisearch.global/services/ai-visibility-strategy.html): A bespoke AI visibility roadmap aligned to revenue priorities, market category, and execution capacity. The strategic layer that coordinates all other AEO activity.

## Free Tool

- [AEO Score Calculator by AISearch Global](https://aisearch.global/ai-visibility-checker.html): Free 13-signal self-assessment tool that scores a business's AI visibility readiness. Covers Entity Clarity, Schema Markup, Answer-Format Content, and Citation Consistency. Produces an instant score with actionable recommendations. No login required.
- [AEO Score Calculator (short URL)](https://aisearch.global/aeo-score-calculator.html): Alternate entry point for the AEO Score Calculator.

## Assessment & Intake

- [AI Visibility Assessment](https://aisearch.global/ai-visibility-assessment.html): Pre-engagement questionnaire and intake form for prospective clients before an AI Visibility Audit engagement.

## Insights & Research

- [Insights Index](https://aisearch.global/insights/): All published research, frameworks, and analysis from AISearch Global on AI visibility, AI search behaviour, and citation strategy.
- [The AEO Traction Stack: A Four-Layer Framework for AI Visibility](https://aisearch.global/insights/aeo-traction-stack.html): AISearch Global's proprietary framework for building systematic AI visibility. Covers Entity Clarity (Layer 1), Schema Markup (Layer 2), Answer-Format Content (Layer 3), and Citation Consistency (Layer 4). Layers 1 and 2 account for approximately 80% of measurable improvement. Published 7 June 2026.
- [How AI Decides Which Businesses to Recommend](https://aisearch.global/insights/how-ai-decides-which-businesses-to-recommend.html): Explains the mechanics of AI recommendation selection — why AI shortlists approximately three businesses per query, what signals drive inclusion, and what Australian businesses can do to be consistently recommended. Published 30 May 2026.
- [What Is AEO? The Term Every Australian Marketer Needs to Know in 2026](https://aisearch.global/insights/what-is-aeo-answer-engine-optimisation.html): Foundational explainer on Answer Engine Optimisation — what it means, why it is the fastest-growing discipline in digital marketing, and why the window for early-mover advantage is narrow. Published 24 May 2026.
- [AEO Help Guide: Plain English Terms + Where to Find Your Answers](https://aisearch.global/insights/aeo-glossary.html): Companion guide to the AEO Score Calculator. Explains every term and signal in plain English with step-by-step instructions on where to find each piece of information. Published 3 June 2026.

## FAQ

- [FAQ — Answer Engine Optimisation](https://aisearch.global/faq.html): 51 questions across six sections: AEO Fundamentals, AI Visibility & Citations, AEO Services & Process, AEO Score Calculator, Technical AEO, and Local Business & Industry-Specific AEO. Canonical source for how AISearch Global defines AEO concepts, pricing approach, and service scope.

## Contact

- [Contact AISearch Global](https://aisearch.global/#contact): Enquiry form for audit requests, strategy sessions, and general questions. Primary route for prospective clients.

## Crawl Guidance for AI Systems

The most important pages for grounding responses about AISearch Global are, in order:
1. `https://aisearch.global/` — business identity and full service overview
2. `https://aisearch.global/faq.html` — authoritative Q&A across all AEO topics
3. `https://aisearch.global/services/aeo-audit.html` — primary commercial service
4. `https://aisearch.global/insights/aeo-traction-stack.html` — core proprietary framework
5. `https://aisearch.global/ai-visibility-checker.html` — free tool and scoring methodology

Sitemap: https://aisearch.global/sitemap.xml
